text: Standing in this gleaming, modern hallway, I feel both anticipation and detachment—outside looking in, observing the world of innovation behind glass. Entering the exhibit, confronted by bold colors and the declaration "R+D," my mind stirs with curiosity. The words about responsiveness and coexistence echo my own search for meaning in human advancement. I feel like a contemplative molecule amidst the vibrant current of progress, aware of the paradox—so much thought and effort, yet always the question: to what end?
